title: The Miami Bank Robbery
overview: A robber who attempted to rob a bank but failed has barricaded himself in the clock tower. The incident becomes a quagmire when a youkai willingly takes him hostage. Luu, fed up with the stalemate, decides to force his way in.

title: All About The Miami Guns!
overview: This is a compilation that includes nostalgic episodes such as why Yo became a police officer and the tragic detective Junshiki Taro. You can also see the transitions throughout the series, such as the fact that the police chief was black in the early days of the series.

title: Spy! Miami Girls School
overview: A dark shadow is lurking in the beautiful maiden's garden. The demon Luu decides to go undercover, but finds himself trapped in a hellish trap. Tojo Nagisa, an honor student who is trying to get close to the demon, has a certain goal in mind, and the school soon becomes a battlefield.

title: Miami Mountain Pass GO GO GO!
overview: Maiami City is a city surrounded by a beautiful sea and a balmy climate. Beautiful police officers Sakurakoji Yo and Amano Ruu are trying to keep the peace today as well. Late at night, a series of street racer hunts occur at Maiami Pass. Yo, Ruu, closes in on the criminals and challenges them to a life-or-death car battle.

title: The Gunman With A Little Alligator
overview: Beautiful police officers Sakurakoji You and Amano Ruu are trying to keep the peace in Maiami City today. Gunshots echo through Maiami Western Village. One after another, bounty hunters are defeated. A mysterious man appears, aiming for the invisible bounty hunter Maria Rose.

title: Watermelon Bomb!
overview: Maiami City is a city surrounded by a beautiful sea and a balmy climate. Beautiful police officers Sakurakoji Yo and Amano Ruu are trying to keep the peace today as well. 100 watermelon bombs have been planted in Maiami City. Yo and Ruu face the challenge of Joke Jordan.

title: Princess Nokemono
overview: After accidentally blowing up the Maiami Police Station, Yo was fired from the police force. This left her isolated and cornered. However, her wild blood awakened, and she eventually transformed into Maiami Primitive Man.

title: The Sea! Bikinis! Ghosts!
overview: On a vacation-like visit to an island, the spirits were having fun. A suspicious gaze was watching them from the shadows. The place was famous as a haunted spot. The spirits were swept away from their ship and could not return home, so they spent a night of fear...

title: Ten Million Miami Dollar Woman
overview: Today, the beautiful police officers Sakurakoji You and Amano Ruu are trying to keep the peace in Maiami City. Tojo Nagisa has put a bounty of 10 million yen on You, whom he hates. Meanwhile, You takes to the stage of a beauty contest, leaving assassins gathered in Miami behind.

title: Zenigeba Deka R
overview: Yo, who is suffering from a lack of money, goes to a casino hoping to turn things around. However, he is betrayed by his partner, the robot detective R, and ends up penniless. He then recruits Ruu, who is currently undercover, to join him in a huge gamble of one trillion dollars.

title: Burning Plan of Revenge
overview: A group of prisoners break out of Maiami Prison. While a large-scale hunt for the escapees is underway, Yo heads to Nagisa Tojo's birthday party. However, at Nagisa's house, some vicious escapees are waiting for Yo's arrival.

title: Shameless Guerilla
overview: Youkai is nowhere to be found. Ruu is worried, but with the Maiami Summit, where important people gather, approaching, she doesn't have time to look for you. In fact, Youkai has infiltrated the summit venue to catch the mastermind behind the organization that controls the dark side of Maiami City.

title: Goodbye, Miami Guns?!
overview: Beautiful police officers Sakurakoji You and Amano Ruu are trying to keep the peace in Maiami City today. The incident occurred in a conference room. The summit venue was occupied by an organization, and VIPs, the police chief, and police officers were all taken hostage. Also, a huge missile is aimed at Maiami City...
